body:
# Amrit Sidhu-Brar

**Role:** Director of Operations

[Amrit Sidhu-Brar](https://www.linkedin.com/in/amrit-sidhu-brar/) joins us from the [Center on Long-term Risk](https://longtermrisk.org/), where he was Director of Operations. He has advised and supported several charities on their operations set-ups.
text: Amrit Sidhu-Brar Role: Director of Operations Amrit Sidhu-Brar joins us from the Center on Long-term Risk, where he was Director of Operations. He has advised and supported several charities on their operations set-ups.
